title: Chat Disabler
description: Completely hides Minecraft chat. No sending, no receiving, no rendering. Press F6 to toggle.Please be warned that the mod will start as soon as you start your world so press f6 again if you want chat back.
body:
# Chat Disabler

Completely disables Minecraft chat. No sending, no receiving, no rendering — chat is just gone.

## ⚠️ Read This Before Installing

This mod **completely removes** your ability to use chat:

- You **cannot** send messages
- You **will not see** incoming messages from other players
- The chat HUD is **invisible**
- Pressing **T** or **/** does nothing
- Chat is **disabled by default** when you launch the game

To turn chat back on, press **F6**. Press it again to disable it.

## Features

- Chat HUD is invisible (skips rendering entirely)
- Incoming messages are dropped before they hit the chat backlog
- Pressing T or / does nothing — the chat screen can't open
- A red "Chat disabled" / green "Chat enabled" indicator appears above the hotbar when toggling

## Use Cases

- Streaming or recording without chat clutter
- Avoiding toxic chat on public servers
- Roleplay / immersion
- Focus mode

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.11**
- **Fabric Loader** 0.18.0+
- **Fabric API**

## Toggle Key

Press **F6** to toggle chat on or off. The keybind is hardcoded in this version.
